name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: ✅ Support our women in primaries next month ✅ Get your 2018 Membership Card
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5650/24c69fd9/11caca78a/189418de/3308296564/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact&source=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact")
---

Peter,

Some organizations don't get involved in primaries, but at EMILY's List, we do.

We get involved early, endorsing women to help get them through competitive races. Because primaries are some of the best opportunities we have to increase the number of pro-choice Democratic women in office.

And next month, EMILY's List women in Illinois and Texas have primaries -- some in races where they are the **only** women running. They're going to need the support of this entire community to come out on top.

**[Donate $3 now to become an EMILY's List member and show you have our women's backs as they head into tough primaries.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5650/24c69fd9/11caca78a/189418df/3308296564/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180212_email_FebMembershipWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup9050+now+to+ren&utm_campaign=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact&source=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact")**

If you didn't think primaries were a big deal, think again.

Coming out strong in primaries can help set our women apart from their Republican opponents and give them an advantage in the general election -- like the primary Gina Ortiz Jones is facing in Texas' 23rd Congressional District.

And sometimes winning can be **the whole ball game** , especially for our candidates running in strong blue districts -- like Veronica Escobar (TX-16).

When you become an EMILY's List member, you're showing your commitment to helping pro-choice Democratic women every step of the way -- from the primary all the way to Election Day.

**Donate $3 now to become a 2018 member and help pro-choice Democratic women win their primaries:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/February-2018-Membership-Week](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5650/24c69fd9/11caca78a/189418d8/3308296564/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180212_email_FebMembershipWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFebruary2018Memb&utm_campaign=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact&source=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5650/24c69fd9/11caca78a/189418d9/3308296564/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180212_email_FebMembershipWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact&source=WQEFRN23N_digital_email_20180212_WhyPrimariesMatter_inact")**

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: Save the Date: NHGOP 2018
body:
Derek,
The following are critical dates in 2018 for you to save on your calendar! We know with your support and attendance at these events, we will secure victory in the November elections.
**SAVE THE DATE FOR THESE UPCOMING NHGOP EVENTS IN 2018/2019:**
April Communications Summit - TBD
NHGOP State Convention - May 12th
NHGOP Birthday Bash for President Trump - June 14th
NH State Candidates Training - June 23rd
RED Summit & Unity Rally - September 15th
NHGOP Celebration of the 165th Anniversary of the Republican Party - October 12th
NHGOP Annual Meeting - January 26th, 2019
**OTHER IMPORTANT DATES IN 2018:**
NH State Candidates Filing Period - June 6th - June 15th
New Hampshire State Primary - September 11th**** New Hampshire General Election - November 6th
Sincerely, Jeanie ForresterNHGOP Chair

name: The White House
subject: Our infrastructure is broken
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c2a518fc9b23587d22bbdca50b5c36fad77d852a90763a9e1b57096d565205bb8d7a5165980b9ced9a132c3defe7761f11

Our infrastructure is broken

Years of inaction have allowed American infrastructure to degrade into a state of disrepair. With
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c29a97df2aacb83bf04e9db7e9329a874a032faf49b249e25904aa23232ee6a0c279d406fe0205c013deae9358cb19d6f5
yesterday’s release of President Donald J. Trump’s Legislative Outline for Rebuilding Infrastructure in America, the Administration is committed to reversing this sad course.

Here are the facts:

- One out of every five miles of highway pavement in the United States is in poor condition.
- More than 50,000 American bridges are rated as “structurally deficient.”
- Commute times have increased every year since 2009—and more than 40 percent of urban interstate miles are congested.
- Nearly 40 percent of Americans living in rural areas lack sufficient broadband access.
- Lengthy reviews hold up infrastructure projects for years.
- The American Society of Civil Engineers estimates that failing to meet our infrastructure needs will cost us $4 trillion in GDP and 2.5 million jobs by 2025.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c22dadc3a65f583fc7232d9caf4943498ee40389810fcaa0d4b3add70bc6e0066c41e759771cc4d4453ddb1ebbea455047
Read why now is the moment we must fix America’s failing infrastructure.

Bonus read:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c250656322f10d414f96842751ea1e681e6d9fdfc000204d1ea2c0ea94e824619d445fed6c9fd6ea276cf5203ba94b9fc0
“A Nation’s infrastructure is a measure of its greatness,” says Gary Cohn

An American budget

Yesterday, White House Office of Management and Budget Director Mick Mulvaney released the Fiscal Year 2019 Budget for the U.S. Government: “Efficient, Effective, Accountable: An American Budget.”

“As a nation, we face difficult times—challenged by a crumbling infrastructure, growing deficits, rogue nations, and irresponsible Washington spending,” Director Mulvaney said. “Through this budget proposal, it is clear that the President and this Administration are determined to reverse these trends.”

Seven things to know about the President’s budget:

- It provides for a robust and rebuilt national defense.
- It promotes a healthy American economy.
- It curbs wasteful Washington spending.
- It supports the President’s innovative infrastructure initiative.
- It secures our porous southern border and strengthens enforcement of immigration law.
- It keeps our commitment to improving veterans’ health.
- It combats the opioids epidemic.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c263437c45a36788e4d7f5ba8b567f9ae64e974c3292af7071600106f87995885f3adbc20b5eaf9e00ee2fa645e97e07b7
“Efficient, Effective, Accountable: An American Budget for Fiscal Year 2019”

Watch: Let the Games begin

Vice President Mike Pence arrived in South Korea last week with Second Lady Karen Pence to lead the American Olympic Delegation for the 2018 Winter Games. He attended the Opening Ceremony in Pyeongchang, South Korea, on Friday.

The Vice President met with South Korean President Moon Jae-in ahead of the Games, discussing how the United States and our global allies will continue to intensify a maximum pressure campaign on North Korea until it abandons its nuclear and ballistic missile programs once and for all.

“We will protect our peoples. We will defend our freedom. And together, we will forge a future of security, prosperity, and peace for both of our nations for generations to come,” the Vice President said.

Watch in 34 seconds:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c2b9de9407d9cca8cc632517d5451167fcf12ed57e3732d63d1b72e2dcd015d98c1de4cfdcca243e98cf07a0ba60030c31
Vice President Pence leads the U.S. delegation at the 2018 Olympics

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump at an infrastructure initiative meeting | February 11, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will host a meeting with members of Congress on trade. Later, the President will host a roundtable with the National Sheriff's Association. In the afternoon, the President and First Lady will host a National African American History Month reception.

Today, Vice President Pence will deliver remarks at the National Museum of African American History and Culture. Later, the Vice President will participate in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c280be16980e2007086e7ae45714538612575088533c339c9e3656adc52e4151ae05cf22ac576025b954ef849e9417541d
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=12ec9a533e12d9c2364320bd4328652b547aa8e485ef2d0ab1c5bd7a9957c98006224f4c8385d9bd5e48e0284dec709aabe69269b7ecf7cf
Contact the White House |

Today, Vice President Pence will deliver remarks at the National Museum of African American History and Culture. Later, the Vice President will participate in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch.

name: DNC HQ
subject: Let's send Conor Lamb to Congress, Derek
body:
On March 13th, there is an important special election in Pennsylvania -- and Conor Lamb needs your help to win.
---
On March 13th, we have another chance to flip a seat in Congress from red to blue.

Conor Lamb is a former Marine and federal prosecutor, and he has a real chance to pull an upset in a traditionally Republican district in western Pennsylvania. Flipping this seat will send a shiver down every Donald Trump-enabling Republican's spine, and it could be crucial to helping Democrats take back the House in November.

But you and I both know that unless Conor has the resources to mobilize voters in his congressional district, he won't win this race.

Every seat matters, Derek. Will you step up to help Conor win?

**Split a $10 donation between Conor Lamb and the DNC to help elect Democrats nationwide.**

**[ DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522174/4067b0a/550745355/7e55753d/1137798765/VEsHDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/conor-lamb?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180213_dnc_nd&source=em_20180213_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180213_dnc_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522174/4067b0a/550745355/7e55753a/1137798765/VEsEBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/conor-lamb?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180213_dnc_nd&source=em_20180213_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180213_dnc_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522174/4067b0a/550745355/7e55753b/1137798765/VEsEBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/conor-lamb?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=21+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180213_dnc_nd&source=em_20180213_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180213_dnc_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522174/4067b0a/550745355/7e557538/1137798765/VEsEBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/conor-lamb?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=22+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180213_dnc_nd&source=em_20180213_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180213_dnc_nd")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522174/4067b0a/550745355/7e557539/1137798765/VEsEBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/conor-lamb?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=23+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180213_dnc_nd&source=em_20180213_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180213_dnc_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522174/4067b0a/550745355/7e5574c6/1137798765/VEsEAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/conor-lamb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=24+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180213_dnc_nd&source=em_20180213_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180213_dnc_nd")
** If we send Conor to Congress, we'll be one step closer to taking back control of the House -- and I guarantee you it will make every single Republican up for re-election this November think twice about staying in lockstep with Trump. Conor has an uphill battle ahead of him -- his congressional district has been represented by a Republican ever since it was redrawn almost two decades ago. He can pull off this upset, but it won't happen without your help.

This special election is coming up in just a few weeks -- and time is running out to make a difference in this race.

**[Split a $10 donation between Conor Lamb's campaign and the DNC right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522174/4067b0a/550745355/7e5574c7/1137798765/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/conor-lamb?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+Split+a++if+consinConsGroup28497++set+ma&utm_campaign=em_20180213_dnc_nd&source=em_20180213_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20180213_dnc_nd")**

Thanks for stepping up,

Amanda

subject: We can send Conor Lamb to Congress, Derek
body:
Conor Lamb's election is coming up on March 13th. Chip in today to help him win his race:
---
Derek --

In just 28 days, voters in Pennsylvania's 18th District will get the chance to send Conor Lamb to Congress -- and flip a House seat from red to blue.

This is a close race, and Republicans are pouring in millions of dollars to try to defeat him. Unlike his Republican opponent, Conor isn't accepting corporate PAC donations -- he's relying on grassroots supporters like you, Derek.

**Will you step up to help Conor win the Pennsylvania special election? Split a $10 contribution between Conor Lamb and the DNC today to elect Democrats nationwide.**

body:

| | There are a lot of things Congress should be doing right now. Funding initiatives to combat climate change. Finding ways to create jobs. Reforming immigration. What are we doing instead? **Passing resolutions that fund the government for weeks at a time.** Washington is lurching from one crisis to the next, without making any real progress. If we want forward motion on any of our priorities, we need to organize. Organizing takes resources. This month, we need to raise $20,000 to stay on track. **Will you give $5, $10, or even more to help out? subject: Will you support the 13 Democratic women who will fight for you, friend?

body:
The Democratic women of the Senate are like the U.S. Olympic team: They may all be different in their approach but they're all united in their determination to do what's best for our country, for our fellow Americans.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180213-Mikulski-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Friend --

The Democratic women of the Senate are like the U.S. Olympic team: They may all be different in their approach but they're all united in their determination to do what's best for our country, for our fellow Americans.

They're champions for creating jobs, making quality childcare more affordable, and strengthening the middle class -- and that's why we need to make sure we re-elect them this November.

Friend, HALF the women of the Senate are up for re-election this year -- and we can't afford to lose a single one. We also have the wonderful opportunity of adding two more female champions (and flipping two red seats to blue!) with Jacky Rosen in Nevada and Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.

[**So I have to ask: Can I count on you today to help get these women elected? The DSCC 's Women's Senate Network is committed to getting each of our Democratic women Senate candidates elected this November -- and your support to them today will go a long way. Simply chip in $1 to show your support >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018a?refcode=DPE-20180213-Mikulski-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

The fact is that when women are in positions of power, our national debate reflects the needs and dreams of American families -- from affordable healthcare to quality education.

But more importantly, it means women know how to work to get the job done.

Friend, our Democratic women understand the needs of working Americans -- and you bet they'll continue to fight and do what's best for American families.

[**Now, let 's make sure we keep them in the Senate. Chip in today to support the DSCC's Women's Senate Network and help our 13 Democratic women candidates >>**](http://action.dscc. name: Team Gina
subject: Add your name to stand against offshore drilling!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hello,
**The North Atlantic region is home to one of the most productive and sensitive marine ecosystems in the world, not to mention Rhode Island 's tourism, recreation and fishing industries.** These facts have been ignored by the federal government, as President Trump and Secretary Zinke have signalled their intent to open up New England's coastal waters to offshore drilling. **A single oil spill could decimate our coasts for years to come.**
**[Click here now to add your name and stand against offshore drilling!](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzjzcfkfZXxlVdZWxIetNqIzP2wux1cybIQ9kh9EsAs=/6GaxHUZoJlR6FkN-zp8H4yGOVWihpaKQa7iON4HDluw=)**
**We all saw what happened when the Deepwater Horizon oil rig exploded in the Gulf of Mexico** , in 2010. 11 people died in the explosion. Hundreds of millions of gallons of crude oil poured into the Gulf, killing unbelievable amounts of wildlife and shattering the entire ecosystem. **We cannot risk that kind of damage happening here in Rhode Island.**
Governor Raimondo, alongside Senator Whitehouse, Congressman Langevin, and Congressman Cicilline have all come together to oppose the new offshore drilling proposal, but that alone may not be enough. That's why it's so important for you to join the fight and **[add your name to the petition NOW!](https://act.myngp.com/el/DzjzcfkfZXxlVdZWxIetNqIzP2wux1cybIQ9kh9EsAs=/6GaxHUZoJlR6FkN-zp8H4yGOVWihpaKQa7iON4HDluw=)**
Many thanks,
Team Gina

body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend, LegitAction members just helped achieve a major win
for democratic legitimacy!

Thomas Brunell, President Trump’s pro-gerrymandering pick for a top
spot at the U.S. Census Bureau, just withdrew from consideration --
mere weeks after thousands of Legit supporters signed petitions and
made calls to sound the alarm about Brunell.

Right now, we need to prepare to win the next fight. Because the
question isn’t if the administration will unleash another major threat
to our voting rights again this year -- the question is when.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/5425?t=1002&akid=616%2E356062%2EBD6ZSE ]Help keep racking up these groundbreaking wins for legitimacy.

threats like Brunell’s appointment to the Census Bureau.

sham Trump-Pence election commission in January, and our rapid
response to Thomas Brunell’s candidacy just helped prevent a notorious
gerrymandering advocate from controlling the census. We’re making a
serious difference.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today, and every
day.

Russ Feingold

#
Friends,
Undocumented youth wake up in the morning wondering how much time they have left before their protections against deportation expire. Workplaces, schools, and churches are becoming dangerous as more immigration agents are spotted, and the growing fear becomes more concrete as the expiration for DACA ticks closer. Congress had an opportunity to fight for a clean DREAM Act and do the right thing for some of the most vulnerable Americans, but they failed them, they failed us, and they failed the values this country was built upon.
**That is why undocumented youth are marching from New York City to Washington, D.C., culminating in a rally for the right to stay home. This march is a journey of hope led by Dreamers that can inspire other undocumented immigrants to continue fighting for permanent protection and engage allies to stand in solidarity.**
[Stand in solidarity with the Dreamers who are leading the Walk to Stay Home and sign-up today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad34/bed43eb/4ac7d356/75fee473/2664118118/VEsH/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/the-big-walk")
In between the responsibilities of school, work, and family, lives an abyss of uncertainty and great fear for Dreamers. Every night that goes by, 122 undocumented youth are swept back into the shadows of our country and are forced to live in fear of persecution.
[Sign-up here to find the dates when the march will pass through your neighborhood or town.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad34/bed43eb/4ac7d356/75fee473/2664118118/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/the-big-walk")
Revolutionaries have marched across this country to make a political statement louder than any campaign contribution or advertisement. Today, Our Revolution calls on you to march with Dreamers or support this march in whatever way you can.
****[Sign-Up](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad34/bed43eb/4ac7d356/75fee473/2664118118/VEsF/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/the-big-walk")****

In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution

603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad34/bed43eb/4ac7d356/75fee47d/2664118118/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad34/bed43eb/4ac7d356/75fee47c/2664118118/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad34/bed43eb/4ac7d356/75fee47f/2664118118/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Our oceans are not oil fields.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We need everyone to submit comments to Secretary Zinke to prevent offshore drilling. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbb/2f5ea88d/73b371cd/2cbc95cc/928928061/VEsH/ "https://www.regulations.gov/comment?D=BOEM-2017-0074-0001") Friend, You've probably heard the news about Florida. When Republican Governor Rick Scott called Interior Secretary Zinke to ask that Florida be taken off the list for offshore drilling, he agreed without a blink. Apparently, Florida's coasts are "unique" and are "heavily reliant on tourism as an economic driver," said Zinke. **I call baloney. Zinke backing down isn't about Florida's unique coast. It's a purely political move.** If uniqueness and tourism are Zinke's only requirements for protecting our beautiful coasts, Washington more than qualifies. Our coasts host the only national marine sanctuary north of California and parts of two national parks. They're rich in fish and wildlife, world-renowned bird watching areas, and a threatened pod of orca whales. We have huge tourism, recreation, and fishing industries dependent on the health of our oceans. That's why Republicans and Democrats alike have spent decades opposing oil drilling in these waters. [**Tell Secretary Zinke: NO Offshore Drilling!
Submit an Official Comment to the Government **](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbb/2f5ea88d/73b371cd/2cbc95cc/928928061/VEsE/ "https://www.regulations.gov/comment?D=BOEM-2017-0074-0001") Zinke's decision to help Republican Governor Rick Scott stinks of politics. His decision also ignores the utter devastation of past oil spills to wildlife and makes offshore oil spills more likely by removing safeguards. **That's why last Mon day, I formally requested the Trump administration remove Washington state from plans to allow offshore drilling.** I've also invited Secretary Zinke to visit Washington state and sit down with me, in person. If Secretary Zinke is going to threaten a fishing, tourism, and recreation economy worth billions of dollars, he should have the guts to hear from those small business leaders directly about the recklessness of this decision. I for one am committed to protecting our coasts from devastating oil spills and pollution. But I need you to speak up, as well. [**Can you make an official comment today on the Bureau of Ocean Energy Management site? It's a direct line to the Secretary.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbb/2f5ea88d/73b371cd/2cbc95cc/928928061/VEsF/ "https://www.regulations.gov/comment?D=BOEM-2017-0074-0001") | _**When you make your comment, be sure to:**_
* _Clearly state your opposition to offshore drilling in the Pacific. Identify yourself and where you're from, particularly noting if you are a coastal resident, business owner, or someone whose job depends on a healthy coast._
* _Include facts to support your opposition. Be specific about the potential impacts to the coastal environment and economy._
* _You can read more information about the types of comments that work on the[BOEM website.](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbb/2f5ea88d/73b371cd/2cbc95c3/928928061/VEsC/ "https://www.boem.gov/National-Program-Comment/")_

---
For more than 30 years, our coastline has been protected from federal drilling. Secretary Zinke wants to change all of that. [**Submit a comment now -- make sure he knows why our coasts are worth protecting.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbb/2f5ea88d/73b371cd/2cbc95cc/928928061/VEsD/ "https://www.regulations.gov/comment?D=BOEM-2017-0074-0001")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[SUBMIT A COMMENT »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbb/2f5ea88d/73b371cd/2cbc95cc/928928061/VEsA/ "https://www.regulations.gov/comment?D=BOEM-2017-0074-0001")
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cbb/2f5ea88d/73b371cd/2cbc95c2/928928061/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Tom Wolf
subject: I'm rejecting this gerrymandered map
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hey, I wanted you to be the first to know: **I rejected the Republicans ' gerrymandered map.** **[Governor Tom Wolf Rejects Partisan Gerrymandered Map](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf7f/73a2bc12/31306196/1fcc6514/2040501857/VEsH/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-partisan-gerrymandering/wolf/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=1+-+Governor+Tom+Wolf+Rejects+Partisan+Gerry&utm_campaign=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw&source=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw")** I took a pledge that I would reject any map that is unfair or partisan gerrymandering -- and that's what this is. This map clearly seeks to benefit one political party.

Partisan gerrymandering weakens citizen power, promotes gridlock and stifles meaningful reform. It must be ended once and for all.

**[So I'm asking for your help to make it happen. Please, sign our petition to demand an end to gerrymandering >>](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf7f/73a2bc12/31306196/1fcc6519/2040501857/VEsE/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-partisan-gerrymandering/wolf/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=2+-+So+Irsquom+asking+for+your+help+to+make+&utm_campaign=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw&source=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw")** | | [**Sign your name**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf7f/73a2bc12/31306196/1fcc651f/2040501857/VEsF/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-partisan-gerrymandering/wolf/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=3+-+Sign+your+name&utm_campaign=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw&source=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw")
---
The current map -- drawn by a Republican legislature and a Republican governor -- unfairly divides our communities to benefit Republican political interests. **And the map submitted to me just last week by Republican leaders was still gerrymandered.**

It's simple: gerrymandering hurts our democracy. That's why I made a pledge to support fair maps that will restore our democratic process.

This is not a partisan issue. It's about unrigging the system and drawing fair maps that are representative of the people, not politics.

I vow to do everything I can to make sure we fix our gerrymandered maps now and ensure that they stay that way in the future.

**[If you're with me, please sign our petition today to end partisan gerrymandering:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf7f/73a2bc12/31306196/1fcc651e/2040501857/VEsC/ "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-partisan-gerrymandering/wolf/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=4+-+If+yoursquore+with+me+please+sign+our+pe&utm_campaign=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw&source=em18_180213_gerrym_clk_clq_nd__tw")**

name: Jason Yates
subject: President Trump Proposes $4.4 Trillion Federal Budget
body:
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180213qa01&n=1)
Hi Peter,
On Monday, President Trump proposed a $4.4 trillion federal budget for fiscal year 2019. If this proposal makes it past Congress, it is projected to cause an estimated $1 trillion federal deficit thereby increasing the National Debt.
Peter, currently the United States’ Nation Debt is over $20.6 trillion and counting. Do you know who is the single largest holder of our debt?
Select your answer below and find out if you are correct!
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Flargest-national-debt-holder%2F%3Fa%3D1&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180213qa01&n=2)

"Do not be one who shakes hands in pledge or puts up security for debts; if you lack the means to pay, your very bed will be snatched from under you." body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31ae/9e00690/420669e6/2403b5d2/924757827/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180212_Debat2_fnd_gq_ful__AG&source=em18_180212_Debat2_fnd_gq_ful__AG")
Hello,

Before tonight's debate in Tallahassee, I just want to let you know that I couldn't be prouder going on stage to represent all Floridians and the progressive change we're fighting for.

After Speaker of the House Richard Corcoran's 'racist' and 'fear mongering' TV ad, I knew staying silent wasn't an option. I believe in a welcoming and safe Florida for all people -- unlike Corcoran's Florida, that paints a whole group of our neighbors and friends as violent criminals and murderers.

Despite all the obstacles and challenges thrown at us, you've proven we have the people, the resources, and the tools needed to move Florida forward and bring the blue wave of true progressive change not only across the state but across the entire country.

If we want to rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us, everyone needs to feel welcome and like their voices are heard. And I'm ready and more determined to fight for those voices to be heard and respected.

body:

Hello,

Our democracy is a little backwards right now.

Because of gerrymandered maps, Republican politicians have been choosing their constituents instead of the other way around.

Republican leaders in North Carolina have been especially bad about it, making our state one of the most gerrymandered states in the country. But Roy and others are standing up to fix this.

**Last week, Roy teamed up with Pennsylvania Governor Tom Wolf, Missouri Senator Claire McCaskill, and a coalition of leaders and organizations across the country to end gerrymandering -- but it looks like you may not have signed yet.**

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Trump's corrupt budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
The new Trump budget, like much of what we have seen from this administration, is a gut punch to hardworking American families. Under this plan, millionaires win once again - while working families, kids, individuals with disabilities, and seniors are left out in the cold.

The Trump budget would repeal the Affordable Care Act using the same tired Graham-Cassidy bill we defeated months ago and cause millions more to lose their health insurance, on top of the 13 million who will no longer have coverage due to the GOP tax bill. In addition to cutting Medicare and taking a sledgehammer to Medicaid, it would cut Social Security Disability Insurance - breaking yet another hollow Trump campaign promise.

But that's only the beginning. The Trump budget betrays our students by making it even harder to pay back their student loans, and it eliminates programs to recruit and train top-notch teachers in public schools.

It calls for a $200 billion cut to food and nutrition programs for needy Americans. And it is also a full retreat from America's leadership in the world - gutting the State Department and key programs designed to exert U.S. influence around the world. This is a budget that will scare our allies and comfort our enemies.

[**The bottom line is this: after borrowing $1.5 trillion to finance a tax cut for big corporations and millionaires, Trump wants to pay for it by cutting Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and education. He is not just failing to help the forgotten men and women he promised to prioritize, but actually making their lives much harder.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91874/70cdc2ba/46fcc559/3903d2a/4105641745/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/TrumpBudget?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+The+bottom+line+is+this+after+borrowing+&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180213&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180213")

I have always said that budgets are about much more than numbers. They are about our values and priorities.

This president has never been shy about showing us that he is most concerned with enriching himself, his family and his wealthy friends, not lifting up the American people. If there was ever any doubt, this budget makes that point, once again, crystal clear.

[**The American people deserve better. We need to do more than defeat this budget - we must defeat the mindset and moral corruption that lie behind it. That is something we can do only by working together tirelessly for the next ten months to win back the legislative power to stop Trump and those in Congress who have been enabling him.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91874/70cdc2ba/46fcc559/3903d2b/4105641745/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/TrumpBudget?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+The+American+people+deserve+better+We+ne&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180213&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180213")

Thank you for staying engaged and joining me and my Democratic colleagues as we continue this important fight.

Chris Van Hollen
US Senator

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: Leadership over showmanship
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
This year the world will celebrate the 100th anniversary of the end of a brutal world war, World War I. For me, it's also a year of reflection as my great-grandfather fought in that war, beginning four generations of military service.
Historians talk about the madmen that started the war, about how war was not an inevitability, yet it still happened through human error, ego, and reckless demonstrations of power. Upon the 100th anniversary of this "war to end all wars," we should be pondering its lessons rather than preparing to relive the same mistakes of early 20th century tyrants.
Yet here we are, in 2018, with a President who seems to have all the weaknesses of those early 20th century men who started WWI. We learned just last week that after Donald Trump traveled to Paris for the celebration of Bastille Day, he ordered the Pentagon to prepare his military parade, just "like the one in France."
**Our Commander in Chief should be more focused on taking care of our veterans, who despite risking their lives in war, return home to inadequate healthcare and employment opportunities. But instead, he wants to throw himself a parade.**
We need real leadership: not motivated by showmanship, but that promotes American values and respects our military.
Sincerely,
Travis Tazelaar
Campaign Manager
